% Valid PV format examples — all 4 structural formats from ESS-0000757
% Format: Sys-Sub:Dis-Dev-Idx:Property (full device PV with subsystem)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
PBI-BCM01:Ctrl-MTCA-100:Status
CWM-CWS03:WtrC-PT-011:Pressure
YMIR-SpScn:MC-MCU-001:Position
ISrc-CS:ISS-Magtr-01:Current
Tgt-HeC1010:Proc-TT-003:Temperature
% Format: Sys-Sub::Property (high-level system PV with subsystem)
DTL-010::Temperature
CWM-CWS03::RunMode
CWM-CWS03::SKID_Ok
TD-M::OscillatorSyncStatus
% Format: Sys::Property (high-level system PV)
DTL::ReadyForBeam
Tgt::Status
Tgt::PowerConsumption
ISrc::Status
TD::LastSentDataBlock
LoKI-SC::ReadyForBeam
